title: St. George's Catholic Forane Church
tagline: St. George's Catholic Forane Church — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. George's Catholic Forane Church, Kerala

overview.short: St. George's Catholic Forane Church is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George's Forane Church, locally known as Edapally Church (Malayalam: ഇടപ്പള്ളി പള്ളി) is a Syro Malabar Catholic pilgrimage church in Edapally, Kochi, India. It is considered as Asia's largest shrine dedicated to Saint George, about five million people visit it every year. The church is thought to have been founded in 593 AD. It is regarded as one of the oldest churches in Kerala, after the seven churches founded by Thomas the Apostle in the first century AD. The church was originally dedicated to the Marth Mariam (Virgin Mary).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Edappally Junction
topPlaces.description: Edappally Junction is a road junction at Edappally in Kochi, Kerala, India, where National Highway 66 and National Highway 544 meet. It has long been one of the most congested points on the highway network in the city, and flyovers have been built at the junction to ease traffic.

topPlaces.name: Centre Square Mall, Kochi
topPlaces.description: Centre Square Mall is a shopping mall in the city centre of Kochi in Kerala, India, launched in 2013. Located on MG Road, the mall is spread over 2.5 acres and is owned and operated by Peevees Projects.

topPlaces.name: Edapally metro station
topPlaces.description: Edapally is a station of Kochi Metro. The station is located between Pathadipalam and Changampuzha Park, in the area of Edappally.

topPlaces.name: Edappally Juma Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Edappally Juma Mosque (Malayalam: ഇടപ്പള്ളി മഹല്ലു ജുമാ മസ്ജിദ്), also known as the Edappally Mahallu Juma Masjid, is a Friday mosque, located in Edappally, Kochi, in the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is situated on Old Cheranalllur Road, in Edappally.

topPlaces.name: Edappally
topPlaces.description: Edappally is an urban quarter of the city of Kochi, India. A major commercial centre in Kerala, it is one of the busiest junctions in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Changampuzha Park metro station
topPlaces.description: Changampuzha Park is a station of Kochi Metro. It was inaugurated by the Prime Minister of India Narendra Modi on 17 June and opened for public on 19 June 2017 as a part of the first stretch of the metro system, between Aluva and Palarivattom.

topPlaces.name: Changampuzha Park
topPlaces.description: Changampuzha Park is a recreational park and a venue for various cultural activities in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. Established in 1977, the park is situated at Edapally, the birthplace of the great poet Changampuzha Krishna Pillai, on the side of the National Highway leading to Aluva.

topPlaces.name: Oberon Mall
topPlaces.description: Oberon Mall is a shopping mall located in the Indian city of Kochi. The mall was opened formally on 2 March 2009, though it was launched in 2008.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. George's Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. George's Catholic Forane Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. George's Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. George's Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. George's Catholic Forane Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. George's Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: Stays in St. George's Catholic Forane Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. George's Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Edappally Junction, Centre Square Mall, Kochi, Edapally metro station, Edappally Juma Mosque, Edappally.
